sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92228" key="r(afidopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥᾰφῐδο-ποιός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n92228.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">needle-maker</tr_>, ib.</sense> </entryFree>
